issues.message: <Select> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Select.Option>, <Select.Section>.

issues.message: <Tabs> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Tabs.List>, <Tabs.TabPanel>, <Tabs.Item>.

issues.message: <Table> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Table.Header>, <Table.Column>, <Table.Body>, <Table.Row>, <Table.Cell>, <Table.EditableCell>.

issues.message: <Dialog> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Dialog.Title>, <Dialog.Content>, <Dialog.Actions>.

issues.message: <Menu> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Menu.Item>, <Menu.Section>.

issues.message: <Dialog> is used without any of its sub-components.
issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Dialog.Title>, <Dialog.Content>, <Dialog.Actions>.

issues.message: <Dialog> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
issues.suggestion: Add a <Dialog.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Dialog aria-label="…"> or <Dialog.Title>…</Dialog.Title>.

issues.message: <Dialog> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
issues.suggestion: Add a <Dialog.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Dialog aria-label="…"> or <Dialog.Title>…</Dialog.Title>.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

issues.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
issues.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

errors.message: <Dialog> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
errors.suggestion: Add a <Dialog.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Dialog aria-label="…"> or <Dialog.Title>…</Dialog.Title>.

errors.message: <Dialog> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
errors.suggestion: Add a <Dialog.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Dialog aria-label="…"> or <Dialog.Title>…</Dialog.Title>.

warnings.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
warnings.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.

warnings.message: <Stack> wraps a single child. A flow layout earns its place only with two or more children; with one child it adds a wrapper that does nothing.
warnings.suggestion: Render the child directly instead of wrapping it in <Stack>. For single-child spacing use Inset, Center, Breakout or Aspect.
